recs.s: TOP PRIORITY (escalating, 4 workflows since 05-26, 2 today). Make 'Process Safe Outputs' treat an individual failed/invalid item as skipped-with-warning whenever >=1 item in the same batch succeeded, instead of red-failing the entire job. Today this nullified 11 successful update_issue items (Sub-Issue Closer 26706621748) and 3 successful create_issue + 1 create_discussion (LintMonster 26702419759). Two supporting fixes: (1) validate target=* at the MCP emit boundary — reject an add_comment whose context cannot resolve to a concrete issue/PR number (e.g. schedule events) so the agent self-corrects in-loop; prompt-only guardrails have repeatedly failed. (2) Investigate why assign_to_agent to 'copilot' returned GitHub API 'Request failed' for #36048/#36049 — endpoint, permission, or eventual-consistency right after create_issue.

RECURRING 2nd consecutive day, now a 2nd workflow. Daily Firewall Logs Collector (26702042593) blew the 25M effective-token cap (25.41M/25M) exactly as Linter Miner did 05-30 (25.13M/25M), and Documentation Noob Tester reached 25.03M and barely passed. Two-part fix: (1) Reduce the effective-token footprint of heavy daily-aggregation workflows (Daily Firewall Logs, Linter Miner, Documentation Noob Tester) — chunk scope, trim per-item context, or split into smaller runs to stay under 25M eff_tok. (2) Harness: detect the 429 'Maximum effective tokens exceeded' signature and FAIL FAST rather than retrying 4x with --continue (continuation cannot recover a hard cap; it wastes ~90s x4). Ties into open #35661.

NEW & ACTIONABLE. Code Simplifier (26703540010) failed its detection job because the threat-detection prompt.txt was missing — the setup 'cp /tmp/gh-aw/aw-prompts/prompt.txt ... || true' silently masked the missing source, then the detection agent hard-failed ('Prompt file not found') with exit 1 and no THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT. Fix the detection harness: do NOT mask the cp with '|| true'; verify the prompt file exists (and is non-empty) before invoking the detection agent, and either fail with a clear actionable error or regenerate the prompt. Shared step => protects every create_pull_request workflow.

TRANSIENT/external. Test Quality Sentinel (26700870332) and Design Decision Gate (26700870336) failed because PR head branch 'copilot/update-agentic-workflows-and-skill-file' was deleted/merged before they checked out ('couldn't find remote ref'). Optional hardening: at checkout, detect a missing PR head ref and exit with a NEUTRAL/skip conclusion rather than a red failure, so a branch deleted mid-flight does not count as a workflow failure. Low priority — no code defect, just noise reduction.

WATCH: Go Logger Enhancement (26703472897, claude/opus) was the day's most expensive run at $8.30 / 41.9M eff_tok / 117 turns — a new daily-cost high, but it SUCCEEDED (value-for-cost, not waste). No action; monitor whether the 117-turn / 41.9M-eff heavy tail repeats or grows.

PREVENTIVE (did not recur 05-31). Keep open: harden the install-golangci-lint Makefile target (~Makefile:403) — download to a temp file, verify HTTP 200 + gzip magic bytes before extracting, retry with backoff (3x), pin+verify a checksum, prefer Actions cache / vendored binary. Prevents the 05-30 non-gzip/tar exit-2 flake from recurring across all dependent workflows.

CARRIED: Avenger absent 3 consecutive windows (05-29/30/31); --max-turns 25 issue still unverified. Keep the 'set max-turns: ~50 in .github/workflows/avenger.md' recommendation open; re-evaluate when Avenger next runs.

CARRIED (no 05-31 recurrence yet; the window's Failure Investigator run 26707041713 was still in-progress at audit time). Re-confirm next window whether the [aw] Failure Investigator early-exits on a clean (zero-failure) window instead of burning the full 60-min Claude CLI ceiling and red-failing, as seen 05-30 ($7.15 wasted).
